meta.title: MF Digital Solutions — Digital development studio
meta.description: Digital development studio in Milan and Lodi. We build custom sites, eCommerce and internal tools. And we run an eCommerce of our own.

hero.titleLine2: And run an eCommerce of our own.
hero.subtitle: Custom sites, eCommerce and internal tools. Marco and Fra, from Milan and Lodi.

services.title: What we do
services.intro: Four things we do well. Nothing else.

items.title: Showcase sites & landing pages
items.body: For those who need to be found and tell their story well. Next.js or Astro, headless CMS when needed.

items.title: eCommerce
items.body: Stores that sell — not just exist. We run FF Phone Lab on Shopify and eBay.

items.title: Custom internal tools & web apps
items.body: The internal software that runs your operations. Orders, inventory, returns, scheduling.

items.title: Consulting & integrations
items.body: Audits, technical decisions, integrations between tools you already use.

about.title: Operators, not just consultants.
about.para1: We're Marco and Fra, two developers. Based in Milan and Lodi. We build custom sites, eCommerce and internal tools.
about.para2: We also run FF Phone Lab, our own smartphone eCommerce. We know what selling online really takes. That's why we speak the language of people who do it daily.

portfolio.title: Recent work
portfolio.intro: Two projects, two different worlds. The same way of working.

contact.title: Tell us what you need.
contact.body: A couple of lines about the project and timing. We reply within two business days.

form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.messagePlaceholder: A couple of lines about the project

contact.successBody: Thanks. We'll get back to you shortly at the address you gave us.
contact.availability: Available for new projects on request
